subcodes.first_line: O Áqá Khán! Hearken unto My call from the precincts of My prison, for verily it hath been raised in such wise that both East and West have been blessed by hearkening thereunto [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا آقا خان اسمع ندائی فی شطر سجنی انه ارتفع علی شان فاز باصغائه الشرق و الغرب
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @praise and encouragement, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @suffering and imprisonment
